message:
feat(storage,sync): snapshot sync with immutable semantics and dedup correlation (wa-nu4.3.7.1)

Snapshot Sync:
- Immutable filename format: wa_snapshot_{version}_{timestamp}_{workspace}_{host}.db
- Live DB detection (rejects WAL/SHM files) prevents sync corruption
- Never overwrites existing snapshots — idempotent semantics for
  disaster recovery and cross-host data export
- Parse/generate snapshot filenames with full validation

Storage Enhancements:
- New CorrelationType::DedupeGroup for same-rule firing across multiple panes
- Temporal correlation window expanded 5s→10s (broader causality capture)
- Failover correlation window expanded 60s→5min (multi-step failover sequences)
- New dedupe window at 30s (groups related events across panes)
- CorrelationType derives Hash for use in sets and maps

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
